commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs maintainer/security decision on the MCP path-write policy and contributor real-behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair until the API direction is chosen.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete MCP filesystem-write concern by exposing caller-controlled image output paths without a safe-path boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Constrain MCP image output paths — src/mcp/utils.ts:70-76 (sha=d54ef7e604b8ac064f85441a99a8eca902079356)
commands.review_summary:
Adds MCP `consult` `generateImage`/`outputPath` inputs, returns artifact/image summaries in structured output, and documents/tests ChatGPT browser image artifact handling for agent callers.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows MCP maps caller-supplied `generateImage`/`outputPath` into `RunOracleOptions`, and the existing ChatGPT image saver writes to the resolved path. I did not run the live browser image flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer/security decision on the MCP path-write policy and contributor real-behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair until the API direction is chosen.

target.title: [codex] Expose ChatGPT image outputs to MCP agents
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `generateImage` and `outputPath` to the MCP `consult` tool so agent callers can trigger the ChatGPT image-aware wait/download path used by CLI `--generate-image`.
- Return saved session artifacts, including a convenience `images` array with paths and ChatGPT file metadata, in structured MCP output.
- Document the agent image workflow in MCP/browser docs, README, and changelog.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/utils.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md README.md docs/browser-mode.md docs/mcp.md src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/mcp/types.ts src/mcp/utils.ts src/mcp/tools/consult.ts tests/mcp/utils.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit` fails on existing repo-wide issues unrelated to this patch: `scripts/check.ts` Bun/esbuild target typing and `tests/browser/chatgptImages.test.ts` fetch mock typing under Node 26.
target.author: umutkeltek
